name: APARTMENT INVESTMENT & MANAGEMENT CO
business: Aimco is a self-administered and self-managed real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns and operates apartment communities in targeted U.S. markets. Its primary business is making real estate investments in the multifamily sector. The company is currently executing a plan of sale and liquidation to sell all its assets and dissolve.

exposures.sentence: Prior to the adoption of the Plan of Sale and Liquidation, our mission was to make real estate investments, primarily focused on the multifamily sector within targeted U.S. markets, where outcomes were enhanced through our human capital and substantial value was created for investors, teammates, and the communities in which we operated.

catalysts.event: Board approval of Plan of Sale and Liquidation
catalysts.sentence: On November 10, 2025, the board of directors of Aimco (the Board ) approved a plan of sale and liquidation (the Plan of Sale and Liquidation ), which contemplates the sale or disposition of all the Company s assets, the wind-down of the Company s business and affairs and the termination of the Company s existence by voluntary dissolution in accordance with the Maryland General Corporation Law (the MGCL ), and directed that the Plan of Sale and Liquidation be submitted for approval to the Company s stockholders.

catalysts.event: Stockholders adoption of Plan of Sale and Liquidation
catalysts.sentence: On February 6, 2026, our stockholders adopted the Plan of Sale and Liquidation.

catalysts.event: Expected completion of liquidation within 24 months of adoption
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate that Aimco's liquidating distributions will exceed its taxable income recognized in each tax year following the adoption of the Plan of Sale and Liquidation, and that its liquidation will be completed within 24 months of such adoption.
